'''鈭歴-h-k''' ('''sahaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zing|zing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zing|zing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-h-k
|-
! Lemma
| sahaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sahakithi|sahakithi]] || [[word:sahakiji|sahakiji]] || [[word:sahakishi|sahakishi]] || [[word:sahaki|sahaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sahakuthuth|sahakuthuth]] || [[word:sahakujuj|sahakujuj]] || [[word:sahakushush|sahakushush]] || [[word:sahak|sahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sahakuthu|sahakuthu]] || [[word:sahakuju|sahakuju]] || [[word:sahakushu|sahakushu]] || [[word:sahaku|sahaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sahakufuth|sahakufuth]] || [[word:sahakufuj|sahakufuj]] || [[word:sahakufush|sahakufush]] || [[word:sahakuf|sahakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sahakethe|sahakethe]] || [[word:sahakeje|sahakeje]] || [[word:sahakeshe|sahakeshe]] || [[word:sahake|sahake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sahakothoth|sahakothoth]] || [[word:sahakojoj|sahakojoj]] || [[word:sahakoshosh|sahakoshosh]] || [[word:sahak|sahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sahakotho|sahakotho]] || [[word:sahakojo|sahakojo]] || [[word:sahakosho|sahakosho]] || [[word:sahako|sahako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sahakofoth|sahakofoth]] || [[word:sahakofoj|sahakofoj]] || [[word:sahakofosh|sahakofosh]] || [[word:sahakof|sahakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sahak忙th忙|sahak忙th忙]] || [[word:sahak忙j忙|sahak忙j忙]] || [[word:sahak忙sh忙|sahak忙sh忙]] || [[word:sahak忙|sahak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sahakathath|sahakathath]] || [[word:sahakajaj|sahakajaj]] || [[word:sahakashash|sahakashash]] || [[word:sahak|sahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sahakatha|sahakatha]] || [[word:sahakaja|sahakaja]] || [[word:sahakasha|sahakasha]] || [[word:sahaka|sahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sahakafath|sahakafath]] || [[word:sahakafaj|sahakafaj]] || [[word:sahakafash|sahakafash]] || [[word:sahakaf|sahakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sahakasha|sahakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosahakasha|gosahakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisahakasha|gokisahakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sahakn眉sha|sahakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosahaknkn眉sha|gosahaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisahakn眉sha|gokisahakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sahaksh毛sha|sahaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosahaknksh毛sha|gosahaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisahaksh毛sha|gokisahaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sahakrosha|sahakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosahaknkrosha|gosahaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisahakrosha|gokisahakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sahakmusha|sahakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosahaknkmusha|gosahaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahakmusha|gokisahakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sahaksherasha|sahaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosahaknksherasha|gosahaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisahaksherasha|gokisahaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sahakngasha|sahakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosahaknkngasha|gosahaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisahakngasha|gokisahakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sahakyasha|sahakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosahaknkyasha|gosahaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisahakyasha|gokisahakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sahakyamasha|sahakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosahaknkyamasha|gosahaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisahakyamasha|gokisahakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sahakn眉sh毛sha|sahakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosahaknkn眉sh毛sha|gosahaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisahakn眉sh毛sha|gokisahakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sahakn眉rosha|sahakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosahaknkn眉rosha|gosahaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisahakn眉rosha|gokisahakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahakn眉musha|sahakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosahaknkn眉musha|gosahaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahakn眉musha|gokisahakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sahaksh毛n眉sha|sahaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosahaknksh毛n眉sha|gosahaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisahaksh毛n眉sha|gokisahaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sahaksh毛rosha|sahaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosahaknksh毛rosha|gosahaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisahaksh毛rosha|gokisahaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahaksh毛musha|sahaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosahaknksh毛musha|gosahaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahaksh毛musha|gokisahaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sahakron眉sha|sahakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosahaknkron眉sha|gosahaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisahakron眉sha|gokisahakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sahakrosh毛sha|sahakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosahaknkrosh毛sha|gosahaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisahakrosh毛sha|gokisahakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sahakromusha|sahakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosahaknkromusha|gosahaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisahakromusha|gokisahakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sahakmun眉sha|sahakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosahaknkmun眉sha|gosahaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisahakmun眉sha|gokisahakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sahakmush毛sha|sahakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosahaknkmush毛sha|gosahaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisahakmush毛sha|gokisahakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sahakmurosha|sahakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosahaknkmurosha|gosahaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisahakmurosha|gokisahakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sahak|sahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙h忙k|s忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosahak|hosahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙h忙k|hos忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosahak|hohosahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙h忙k|hohos忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉sahak|n眉sahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙h忙k|n眉s忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sahak|n眉n眉sahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙h忙k|n眉n眉s忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂sahak|n茂sahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙h忙k|n茂s忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sahak|n茂n茂sahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙h忙k|n茂n茂s忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusahak|lusahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙h忙k|lus忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusahak|lulusahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙h忙k|lulus忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisahak|lisahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙h忙k|lis忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisahak|lilisahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙h忙k|lilis忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosahak|kosahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙h忙k|kos忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosahak|kokosahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙h忙k|kokos忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesahak|kesahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙h忙k|kes忙h忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesahak|kekesahak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙h忙k|kekes忙h忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
